title: eryngium bracteosum
intro: Eryngium bracteosum, also known as the blue devil's-disk, is a perennial herbaceous plant that belongs to the carrot family. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antimicrobial properties. The health benefits of Eryngium bracteosum include its ability to reduce inflammation, improve wound healing, and support the immune system. Eryngium bracteosum is often used in herbal preparations such as teas, infusions, and tinctures, which can be made by steeping the plant's leaves and roots in hot water.
